docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY QUE RICHARD AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BUENAVENTURA CECILIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-24-1996, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAR-25-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT QUE RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BUENAVENTURA CECILIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT QUE RICHARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,125.00 FILED BY BUENAVENTURA CECILIA AS TO DEFENDANT QUE RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF BUENAVENTURA CECILIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUENAVENTURA CECILIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT QUE RICHARD PLFT ATTEMPTED TO COLLECT RENT ON A RENTAL UNIT AT A TIME WHEN THE UNIT WAS NOT LEGAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
